settings.title: Settings
settings.myInfoSub: Name, email, phone, date of birth
settings.birthdaySub: Opt-in / opt-out for your special day
settings.privacySub: Who can see my email / phone

security.title: Security 🔐
security.twofaEnabledBody: A verification code will be sent to your email on every login.
security.deleteBody:
We delete your name, email, phone, photo, anonymous links and KYC documents.
We keep your financial transactions 10 years (BCEAO requirement).

changePassword.title: Change my password 🔑
changePassword.intro: To change your password, we need your current password to verify it's really you.
changePassword.sameAsOld: The new password must be different from the old one.
changePassword.successBody: You can now log in with your new password.

privacy.introDefault: Choose who can see your personal info. Your data is always encrypted and secure.
privacy.introSendFlow: Choose what your recipient sees about you on the card. You can change these choices anytime in Settings → Privacy.
privacy.avatarSub: Recipients see your avatar on cards you send
privacy.phoneSub: Your referrals and recipients can see your phone number
privacy.emailSub: Your email appears on your contact card (rare)

birthday.title: Birthday 🎂
birthday.intro: Donia can remind you of your loved ones' birthdays and let you send them a gift card. You can enable or disable this anytime.
birthday.notifsSub: Get a reminder 3 days before each recipient's birthday
birthday.publicSub: On the day, "It's my birthday 🎉" shows on your profile — your friends can send you spontaneous cards
birthday.dobHint: Your friends on Donia will get a reminder for your birthday and can easily send you a card.

notifPref.title: Notifications 🔔
notifPref.intro: Choose how Donia reaches out to you. Critical security notifications are always sent.
notifPref.pushSub: On your phone (cards received, payments, referrals)
notifPref.whatsappSub: Cards received, redemption codes, friends' birthdays
notifPref.footnote: 💡 To stop all notifications, disable all three channels. You can re-enable anytime.

language.title: Language & region 🌍
language.intro: Choose the language you want to use Donia in. Emails, notifications and the interface will follow your choice.
language.appliedBodyFR: L'interface est maintenant en français. Ta préférence est enregistrée.
language.appliedBodyEN: The interface is now in English. Your preference has been saved.
language.footnote: Some technical screens are still in French — translation continues in upcoming releases.

sessions.confirmBody: You'll stay logged in here, but other devices will be signed out immediately.

send.deliveryLabel: How does the recipient get the card?
send.waPlaceholder: WhatsApp number (defaults to the recipient's phone)
send.topupHint: 💡 Or top up your balance first
send.secureBeforePayment: We're checking your sharing preferences before payment

txDetail.title: Details
txDetail.stateCreatedSub: Complete the payment to deliver the card.
txDetail.stateExpiredSub: The redemption window has passed. You can send a new one.
txDetail.senderHidden: The sender chose to keep their contact info private
txDetail.resendSuccessBody: The recipient just got the card again.
txDetail.reportBody: Describe the issue by email at contact@doniia.com.

anonymes.emptyBody: Create your first anonymous link. You'll share it on your stories and receive messages from friends.
anonymes.msgsEmptyBody: Share your link in your stories — when someone writes, it shows up here.

referral.title: Invite friends
referral.subTagline:
On every send from your referrals,
as long as they use Donia.
referral.shareHint: Tap WhatsApp to open it and choose who to send your link to.
referral.codeCopiedBody: Your code "{{code}}" is in the clipboard. Paste it wherever you want.
referral.linkCopiedBody: The referral link is in your clipboard. Paste it anywhere.

notifsList.title: Notifications
notifsList.emptyBodyAll: Your notifications will appear here as soon as there's activity.

history.title: Activity
history.empty:
No transactions yet.
Send your first gift ✨
